name: First Choice Community
description_short: First Choice Community Healthcare is a PCMH-accredited federally qualified health center (FQHC) offering comprehensive primary care, dental, behavioral health, and specialty services across seven locations in the Greater Albuquerque area.
description_long:
First Choice Community Healthcare is a Joint Commission accredited Patient-Centered Medical Home (PCMH) facility serving the Greater Albuquerque area in New Mexico. The organization operates multiple health centers across Alameda, Alamosa, Edgewood, Los Lunas, South Broadway, South Valley, and a school-based medical center in Rio Grande. As a federally qualified health center, the organization is dedicated to improving health outcomes, life skills, and well-being for community members regardless of insurance status or ability to pay.

The organization provides a comprehensive range of healthcare services including primary care, dental services, behavioral health, women's health, school-based and teen clinics, lifestyle medicine, substance use disorder treatment, pharmacy services, laboratory services, health education, specialty care, and telehealth options. Each patient receives personalized care through a team-based approach designed to ensure appropriate care delivery and improved health outcomes. The organization also offers financial assistance programs including sliding fee schedules and discount programs to increase healthcare accessibility.

First Choice Community Healthcare distinguishes itself through its PCMH accreditation model, which emphasizes preventive care, chronic disease management, and coordinated care delivery. The organization accepts new patients and maintains a commitment to serving diverse populations, offering services in multiple languages through translation services. With on-site pharmacy and lab facilities, the organization provides integrated care within a single system. The organization also emphasizes community health through wellness programs and health education initiatives.

As a health center rather than a financial services provider, First Choice Community Healthcare serves an important but distinct role in community health access. Consumers should be aware that this is a healthcare facility, not a financial institution, and does not offer banking services, loans, credit products, or financial aid in the consumer finance sense. The organization's 'Financial Aid & Coverage' offerings refer to healthcare payment assistance and insurance navigation, not consumer lending or credit-related services. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: PCMH Joint Commission accredited facility indicating quality standards in coordinated care delivery
Comprehensive integrated services including primary care, dental, behavioral health, and specialty care at multiple locations
Sliding fee scale and discount programs available to reduce barriers to healthcare access
On-site pharmacy and laboratory services enabling streamlined, coordinated care
Telehealth services available expanding access beyond physical locations
Multiple locations across Greater Albuquerque area (7 health centers) improving geographic accessibility
Translation services available in 100+ languages supporting diverse patient populations
School-based health centers and teen clinic addressing adolescent healthcare needs
cons: Not a consumer finance provider—does not offer loans, credit products, or financial services despite miscategorization
Limited to Greater Albuquerque geographic area; not available nationally or in other regions
Financial assistance programs mentioned but specific eligibility requirements and discount percentages not detailed on website
No online appointment scheduling or patient portal access described on homepage despite 'Pay My Bill' and portal reference
best_for: Uninsured and underinsured residents of Greater Albuquerque seeking affordable comprehensive healthcare
Families requiring integrated primary care, dental, and behavioral health services at single provider network
Patients with chronic conditions who benefit from coordinated care delivery and health education support
diagnosis: First Choice Community Healthcare is a federally qualified health center providing comprehensive primary and preventive care, not a consumer finance provider. This organization was miscategorized as 'payday-alternatives' when it should be categorized as 'banking' or excluded from consumer finance databases entirely, as it offers no lending, credit, or financial products whatsoever.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
